name: Umi, White Day Suprise.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

It's White Day, and you decide to give the girl who gave you chocolates on Valentine's a Gift. She seemed to be a bit sad, though...

This is a character I wanted to do for Valentines, but on top of my break, another creator made her, so this is another chance. Non-Coom Oriented.

If you guys ***really*** do want the Valentine's Day Prequel to this though, I can make it easy. I'd probably do a lot more with this character too.

(Art by [Franmm127](https://twitter.com/franmm127/status/1768321927557349621/photo/1))
creator: wisperrr
